# PrimeGlobalFX

AlphaMexxTrade is a professional forex and multi-asset online trading broker designed to attract and convert global retail traders, with particular appeal to African markets. The brand projects authority, trust, and financial success through a sleek dark-themed aesthetic with blue and green accents, trust badges, awards walls, and aspirational imagery of charts and successful traders. The site is built around urgency-driven, high-pressure marketing with aggressive CTAs, tiered account structures offering escalating VIP benefits, and an interactive onboarding quiz that funnels users toward a recommended account. The overall vibe is bold, credible, and conversion-obsessed — evoking the feel of a globally recognized, regulated broker.

Source: https://example.com

---

## Find your recommended trading account in minutes.


Answer a few simple questions and our smart assessment tool will match you with the account tier and benefits best suited to your trading goals. This suitability guidance helps you start with confidence.







1




### How much would you like to invest?


Choose your starting capital from $1,000 up to $250,000+. We'll recommend the right tier for your budget.







2




### Which asset interests you most?


Forex, indices, commodities, shares, or crypto CFDs — tell us your preferred market.







3




### What leverage level do you prefer?


Select flexible leverage up to 1:500, depending on your risk appetite and experience.







4




### What is your trading experience level?


Beginner, intermediate, or professional — we'll tailor the platform experience to your skill set.







5



### Do you invest in alternative assets?


From ETFs to thematic baskets, let us know if you diversify beyond traditional instruments.







Your Recommendation




### Gold Account


- Spreads from 0.6 pips

- Dedicated senior account manager

- Priority withdrawal processing

- Weekly market signals & analysis


Speak with an account specialist

## Choose an account built for your trading goals

Every tier is designed to match your ambition and capital, giving you the tools and conditions you need to trade with confidence on our award-winning mt4 forex trading platform.

## Common account questions


Everything you need to know about getting started, managing your account, and scaling your trading with PrimeGlobalFX. We've answered the questions our traders ask most often so you can move forward with confidence.












### What is the minimum deposit to open an account?


You can start trading with as little as $1,000 on our Basic tier. Each subsequent tier unlocks tighter spreads, higher leverage, and dedicated support. We recommend funding at a level that aligns with your trading goals and risk strategy.











### How does leverage access work across account types?


Leverage scales with your account tier — from 1:100 on Basic up to 1:500 on Platinum. Higher leverage amplifies your market exposure, but we always encourage responsible use and provide risk-management tools to protect your capital.











### What is the account upgrade path?


You can upgrade at any time by funding the difference to the next tier. Upgrades unlock lower spreads, a personal mentor (Silver and above), VIP signals, and priority withdrawals. Your account manager will guide you through the process seamlessly.











### Who receives dedicated mentor support?


Personal mentor support begins at the Silver tier and becomes a dedicated VIP manager at Gold and Platinum levels. Your mentor helps you refine strategy, interpret market signals, and stay disciplined — giving you an edge from day one.











### What assets can I trade on the mt4 forex trading platform?


PrimeGlobalFX offers 200+ instruments across forex, indices, commodities, shares, and cryptocurrencies — all accessible through the industry-standard MT4 platform. Enjoy fast execution, deep liquidity, and real-time charting on every asset class.











### How do account recommendations work?


Our interactive onboarding quiz evaluates your investment level, preferred assets, experience, and goals to recommend the account tier best suited for you. The recommendation is unbiased — it's designed to match you with the right tools, not the highest deposit.








Ready to take the next step?


Start Trading
Speak to an Expert

Whether you're scalping the markets or managing long-term positions, our platform keeps you connected and in control.

## Guided trading support built for momentum


PrimeGlobalFX equips traders with a structured ecosystem of professional tools, daily market insights, and one-on-one mentorship — designed to keep you moving forward in any market condition. Whether you're refining your first strategy or scaling a proven approach, our support framework helps you trade with clarity and confidence.



- ### Proven trading strategy framework Access battle-tested frameworks refined by institutional analysts and senior traders. Each strategy is structured around clear entry rules, risk parameters, and profit targets — giving you a repeatable edge.

- ### Dedicated mentor guidance Your personal trading mentor provides tailored feedback, reviews your trade journal, and helps you navigate emotional decision-making — accelerating your growth from novice to consistent trader.

- ### Real-time market signals Receive actionable trade alerts with precise entry, stop-loss, and take-profit levels delivered directly to your mt4 forex trading platform and mobile device.

- ### Account review & performance audits Monthly deep-dive sessions where our analysts review your trading history, identify patterns, and suggest concrete improvements to sharpen your execution.

- ### Disciplined planning & risk control Build a personalized trading plan with defined risk limits, daily loss caps, and position-sizing rules — the foundation of every professional trader's longevity.






Designed to support better decision-making, not guaranteed outcomes. Trading forex and CFDs involves substantial risk of loss and is not suitable for all investors. Past performance does not guarantee future results.







Get started today

## Risk & Compliance Information


Please read the following disclaimers carefully before engaging with our forex trading platform. Understanding the risks is essential for responsible trading.






01

### General Disclaimer




The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute financial, investment, or trading advice. PrimeGlobalFX does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of any content, data, or analysis presented. All information is subject to change without notice. Users should independently verify any information before relying on it for trading decisions.






02

### Trading Risk Warning




Trading forex, CFDs, and other leveraged products carries a high level of risk and may not be suitable for all investors. You could sustain losses in excess of your initial deposit. Before deciding to trade, you should carefully consider your investment objectives, level of experience, and risk appetite. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Seek independent financial advice if necessary.






03

### Leverage Risk Explanation




Trading with leverage magnifies both potential profits and potential losses. Even small market movements can have a significant impact on your trading account. High leverage ratios, such as those offered on our mt4 forex trading platform, can rapidly deplete your funds. You should never trade with capital you cannot afford to lose. Always employ appropriate risk management strategies, including stop-loss orders and position sizing.






04

### Informational Use Only




All materials, tools, and resources provided by PrimeGlobalFX, including market analysis, educational content, and trading signals, are intended for informational and educational purposes only. They do not constitute a solicitation, recommendation, or offer to buy or sell any financial instrument. The Forex trading platform is provided as-is, and users assume full responsibility for all trading activities and outcomes.








Trading may not be suitable for all investors. Please ensure you fully understand the risks involved before using our Forex trading platform.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://example.com/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- Accounts
- Markets & Platform
- Education & Support



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/12/2026



PrimeGlobalFX ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: PrimeGlobalFX

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://example.com/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Accounts
- Markets & Platform
- Education & Support



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 12, 2026



PrimeGlobalFX is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: PrimeGlobalFX

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.
















Your trusted partner in global forex trading. PrimeGlobalFX delivers institutional-grade execution, transparent pricing, and dedicated support to help you navigate the world's currency markets with confidence.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://example.com/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 12, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - PrimeGlobalFX

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Financial Services / Forex Brokerage provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


PrimeGlobalFX provides Financial Services / Forex Brokerage through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by PrimeGlobalFX. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: PrimeGlobalFX

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]

















Your trusted partner in global forex trading. PrimeGlobalFX delivers institutional-grade execution, transparent pricing, and dedicated support to help you navigate the world's currency markets with confidence.
